54171.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
54171.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

54172.title: CNN Town Hall
54172.description: President Joe Biden participates in a town hall in Cincinnati, Ohio. Anchor Don Lemon moderates the live event focusing on a wide range of issues facing the nation ranging from Covid-19 to the economy.

54173.title: Anderson Cooper 360
54173.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

54174.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
54174.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes that use stale bread as the key ingredient.

54175.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
54175.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

54176.title: World Sport
54176.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

54177.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
54177.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

54179.title: World Sport
54179.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

54180.title: CNN Newsroom with Kim Brunhuber
54180.description: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

54181.title: CNN Newsroom with Isa Soares
54181.description: Daily headlines and breaking stories live from CNN headquarters in Atlanta. The rotating cast of anchors and contributors include Carol Costello, Kyra Phillips, Suzanne Malveaux, Brooke Baldwin, Don Lemon, Randi Kaye and Fredricka Whitfield.

54182.title: Early Start
54182.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

54183.title: New Day
54183.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

54184.title: World Sport
54184.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

54185.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
54185.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

54186.title: Connect the World
54186.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

54187.title: World Sport
54187.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

54188.title: Connect the World
54188.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

54189.title: One World with Zain Asher
54189.description: Offering a fresh and inclusive take on the top stories from Africa, Europe and beyond, giving every continent an equal voice.

54190.title: Inside Africa
54190.description: From superbikes to racecars and beyond, highlighting some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels and providing an inside look at what life is like on and off the race track.

54191.title: Amanpour
54191.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

54192.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
54192.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

54193.title: Quest Means Business
54193.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

54194.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
54194.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

54195.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
54195.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.
